content.fact_text: Implementation of comprehensive Zod validation schemas for the Inventory Reconciliation service.

provenance_data.behaviour: Defines rigid data contracts for Kafka events, PostgreSQL inventory snapshots, and reconciliation audit trails using Zod to ensure type-safety, input validation, and business invariant enforcement (e.g., total_stock >= reserved_stock).
provenance_data.utility: Provides the source of truth for data validation, ensuring that all inventory-related operations adhere to strict schema constraints before processing.
